messages.message: React Hook useMemo has a missing dependency: 'getMonthlyTotals'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [getMonthlyTotals, year, month]

source:
import React, { useMemo } from 'react'; import { useWalletStore, useTransactionStore, useUserStore } from '../store'; import { formatIDR, getMonthName, plantEmojis } from '../utils/helpers'; import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Wallet, Flame } from 'lucide-react'; export default function Dashboard() { const { wallets } = useWalletStore(); const { transactions, getMonthlyTotals } = useTransactionStore(); const { streak, plantStage, level, totalXP } = useUserStore(); const levelName = useUserStore((s) => s.getLevelName()); const now = new Date(); const year = now.getFullYear(); const month = now.getMonth(); const totals = useMemo(() => getMonthlyTotals(year, month), [transactions, year, month]); const totalBalance = useMemo(() => wallets.reduce((s, w) => s + w.balance, 0), [wallets]); const recentTxs = useMemo(() => transactions.slice(0, 5), [transactions] ); return (
{/* Header */}

Dashboard

Halo! ≡ƒî┐ Selamat datang kembali.

{getMonthName(month)} {year}
{/* Balance Card */}

Total Saldo

{formatIDR(totalBalance)}

Pemasukan

{formatIDR(totals.income)}

Pengeluaran

{formatIDR(totals.expense)}

{/* Streak & Gamification */}
{plantEmojis[plantStage]}

{plantStage === 'seed' ? 'Mulai Hari Ini!' : `${streak} Hari Streak`}

Catat transaksi tiap hari untuk menumbuhkan tanamanmu

Level {level}

{levelName}

{totalXP % 100}/100 XP ke level berikutnya

{/* Quick Wallets */}

Dompet

{wallets.map((w) => (
{w.icon}

{w.name}

{formatIDR(w.balance)}

))}
{/* Recent Transactions */}

Transaksi Terbaru

{recentTxs.length === 0 ? (

≡ƒî▒

Belum ada transaksi. Mulai catat keuanganmu!

) : (
{recentTxs.map((tx) => (
{tx.type === 'income' ? '≡ƒÆ░' : tx.type === 'savings' ? '≡ƒÉ╖' : '≡ƒ¢Æ'}

{tx.note || tx.category || tx.type}

{tx.category}

{tx.type === 'income' ? '+' : '-'}{formatIDR(tx.amount)}

))}
)}
); }
